title: Google Calendar - Private Calendar
excerpt: My calendar has to be set to private for work. I have the shareable link, can share it with people, etc. but I can’t figure out how to share it to Monday so that I can integrate them. Every time I try, I get an error cod…

posts.author: Kcfish (Kevin Andrew Chadwick-Fisher)
posts.cookedHtml:
My calendar has to be set to private for work. I have the shareable link, can share it with people, etc. but I can’t figure out how to share it to Monday so that I can integrate them. Every time I try, I get an error code.

Any ideas?
